channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Senior Software Engineer — Trade & Blockchain · GRVT
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Build and operate core systems powering GRVT's ZK hybrid exchange trading platform; strong distributed systems and blockchain experience required.

item.title: Principal Software Engineer — Trade & Blockchain · GRVT
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Deeply hands-on individual contributor anchoring the most critical, high-risk parts of GRVT's ZK-powered hybrid exchange trading platform.

item.title: Growth Marketing Manager · GRVT
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Drive user acquisition and growth for GRVT's ZK hybrid exchange; experience in crypto exchange marketing and growth loops required.

item.title: Principal Security Engineer / Security Manager · GRVT
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Identify and manage risks across GRVT's engineering verticals; work with teams to mitigate novel risks in a ZK-powered hybrid exchange.

item.title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Web3) · CoW DAO
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Help take decentralized trading to the next level at CoW Protocol/CoW Swap; 3+ years React/TypeScript, Web3 libraries (ethers.js/viem), Ethereum ecosystem exper

item.title: Software Engineer (Python) · CoW DAO
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Build backend infrastructure for CoW Protocol; strong Python, MEV/DeFi trade settlement understanding, Ethereum ecosystem familiarity required.

item.title: Product Designer · Hyperliquid Labs
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Design product experiences for Hyperliquid's perpetuals DEX; strong Web3 trading UI/UX background and ability to work in fast-paced environment.

item.title: Business Development, Lead · Hyperliquid Labs
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Lead BD initiatives for Hyperliquid's ecosystem; strong network in DeFi/DEX space, partnership building, and protocol ecosystem development experience.

item.title: Staff DevOps Engineer (Web3) · ENS Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Manage infrastructure for Ethereum Name Service; Kubernetes, AWS/GCP, CI/CD, blockchain node operations, strong DevOps and Web3 infra background.

item.title: Sr. Smart Contract Engineer · Risk Labs (UMA / Across)
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Implement Across cross-chain bridge protocol smart contracts with focus on security, gas efficiency, and simplicity; 3+ years Solidity experience required.

item.title: Site Reliability Engineer · Seedify
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Ensure reliability, security, and performance of Seedify's launchpad platform; DevOps, infrastructure optimization, incident management, Kubernetes, cloud.

item.title: Data Engineer · Elliptic
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · London / Remote · 面议。Build and maintain data pipelines for blockchain analytics at Elliptic; Python, SQL, Spark/Airflow, on-chain data ingestion and compliance analytics background.

item.title: Web3 Marketing Manager (Content-Focused) · Manta Network
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Lead content marketing for Manta Network L2; 1+ year Web3 marketing experience, strong writing, 5,000+ Twitter/X followers, community building.

item.title: Legal Counsel · Hedera
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote / US · 面议。Advise Hedera (HBAR) on regulatory compliance, contract negotiation, IP, and governance; 1–3 years legal experience, crypto/SEC/CFTC/FinCEN familiarity.

item.title: Blockchain Data Engineer · RWA.xyz
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Build on-chain data pipelines for tokenized real-world assets at RWA.xyz; Python/SQL, EVM data indexing, blockchain analytics, data warehouse experience.

item.title: Senior Web3 Data Analyst · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Analyze on-chain data to drive product decisions at Trust Wallet; SQL, Python, Dune Analytics, EVM/multi-chain data, 3+ years experience in Web3 analytics.

item.title: Front End Developer · Partisia Blockchain
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Build frontend interfaces for Partisia Blockchain's MPC/privacy-focused chain; React/TypeScript, Web3 libraries, blockchain integration experience.

item.title: Staff Blockchain Data Scientist · Tools for Humanity
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · San Francisco, CA / Remote · 面议。Build data science capabilities for Worldcoin/World ID; blockchain analytics, ML, on-chain data, privacy-preserving computation, 5+ years data science.

item.title: Senior Blockchain Data Scientist · Ledger
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Paris / Remote · 面议。Analyze blockchain data to improve Ledger hardware wallet security and product; Python, ML, on-chain data analysis, EVM/multi-chain expertise.

item.title: Infrastructure Engineer · Messari
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote / US · 面议。Build and maintain Messari's data platform infrastructure; Golang, TypeScript, Postgres, Kubernetes/AWS, data ingestion for tens of thousands of trades/minute.

item.title: Sr. Blockchain Operation SRE · Fireblocks
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Israel · 面议。4+ years SRE/DevOps/Infra experience; dive deep into blockchain protocols, analyze root causes for incidents, optimize nodes; Python/JavaScript/Bash, monitoring

item.title: Senior Product Designer · NewTendermint
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Design developer and user-facing products for NewTendermint's blockchain ecosystem; strong UX/UI, Web3 tooling, cross-functional collaboration.

item.title: iOS Engineer (Web3) · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。iOS 开发（Swift/Objective-C）3 年以上，熟悉 Web3 钱包集成、区块链 SDK，有加密货币 App 经验优先。

item.title: Frontend Engineer · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。前端工程师，3 年以上 React/TypeScript 经验，熟悉 ethers.js/Web3.js，有 DeFi 或 NFT 产品经验优先。

item.title: Senior DevOps Engineer · ENS Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上 DevOps/SRE 经验，熟悉 Kubernetes、AWS/GCP、CI/CD 流水线，有区块链节点运维经验优先。

item.title: Web3 Partnerships Manager · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。3 年以上 Web3/DeFi 生态合作经验，熟悉 oracle/跨链协议，具备协议级合作谈判能力，crypto-native 优先。

item.title: Web3 Venture Capital & Strategic Partnerships Manager · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上 VC 或战略合作经验，深度理解 Web3 生态投资逻辑，能独立推进协议级战略合作，VC 背景优先。

item.title: Partnerships Lead - Banking & Capital Markets (North America) · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 负责人/总监 · Remote (North America) · 面议。金融机构/资本市场合作负责人，8 年以上 BD 经验，有 TradFi 向 DeFi 桥接项目经验，熟悉 Chainlink CCIP/DECO 优先。

item.title: Engineering Manager, Infrastructure · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。带领基础设施团队，8 年以上工程经验含 3 年管理，熟悉分布式系统、链下计算基础设施，有区块链节点管理经验。

item.title: Junior Data Engineer, Economics · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。数据工程入门级，熟悉 Python/SQL，有链上数据分析或经济学建模经验优先，研究生学历或同等经验。

item.title: Research Engineer · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。研究型工程师，密码学/分布式系统/ZK 背景，熟悉 Rust/Go，能将学术成果转化为生产级实现，博士或同等经验优先。

item.title: Senior Blockchain Engineer · InfStones
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上区块链工程经验，熟悉 EVM/Cosmos/Solana，精通 Solidity 及多链生态，有节点基础设施开发经验。

item.title: Application Engineer · InfStones
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3 年以上后端/应用开发经验，熟悉 Web3 RPC/API，有 DeFi 协议集成或 SDK 开发经验，Go/Python/Node.js 均可。

item.title: Web3 Solutions Architect · InfStones
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Dallas, TX / Remote · 面议。售前解决方案架构师，5 年以上区块链基础设施经验，能对接企业级客户设计多链节点/RPC 方案，具备客户成功能力。

item.title: Member of Technical Staff, Atlas (Front-End Engineer) · Anchorage Digital
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3 年以上前端工程师，熟悉 React/TypeScript，为机构数字资产结算平台 Atlas 构建前端体验，有金融科技 UI 经验优先。

item.title: Member of Technical Staff, Hardware Security Modules · Anchorage Digital
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。HSM 安全软件工程师，熟悉密码学密钥管理、嵌入式系统开发，为数字资产托管平台核心安全模块构建软件。

item.title: Legal Counsel (EEA Legal), Malta · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Malta · 面议。EU/EEA 法律顾问，5 年以上加密货币/金融监管法律经验，熟悉 MiCA、PSD2、AML/CFT 合规，马耳他执照经验优先。

item.title: Blockchain Core Engineer · 0G Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。区块链核心协议工程师，5 年以上分布式系统/Go 或 Rust 经验，熟悉共识机制及 P2P 网络，为去中心化 AI 基础设施构建底层协议。

item.title: Senior Developer Relations Engineer · 0G Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。高级开发者关系工程师，3 年以上 Web3 开发背景，能编写技术文档、举办开发者工作坊，推动 0G AI 链生态开发者增长。

item.title: DevOps Engineer · 0G Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。DevOps/基础设施工程师，3 年以上经验，熟悉 Kubernetes、云平台、区块链节点部署与 CI/CD 流水线自动化。
